info.name: Vector Engine API Quickstart
info.description: OpenAI-compatible API quickstart for Vector Engine API. Import this collection, set `api_key`, and run the chat completions request to validate your integration. Start here: https://www.vectronode.com?aff=nPRB&utm_source=postman&utm_medium=collection&utm_campaign=integration-update

request.description: Run this request after setting `api_key`. It uses the OpenAI-compatible `/v1/chat/completions` endpoint.
